description: Celebrate Diwali, India's Festival of Lights! These smoky Tandoori BBQ chips transport you to the heart of Delhi, reminiscent of the vibrant street food stalls that celebrate this joyous occasion.
Born on this day in history as a simple invention, the tortilla chip took its first leap from being an ordinary cornmeal snack to a beloved global treat.

chip_name: On The Border Cafe Style Lime Sea Salt Tortilla
description: In honor of National Margarita Day, we're savoring the essence of Mexico's iconic cocktail with our On The Border Cafe Style Lime Sea Salt Tortillas.

Example Description:

Inspired by the sweet joy of National Banana Bread Day in the US, our 'Banana By Oh! Nuts' chips celebrate this cherished tradition with every bite.
On this day of national pride and celebration in Estonia's history, savor the robust flavors that mirror their spirit.

Marking National Lemon Day, celebrate this vibrant day with Limon chips  the embodiment of summer freshness and sunshine in every bite. These tangy and zesty treats are the perfect companion for a sunny celebration.
Marking the joyous celebration of America's beloved cheesy snack on National Nacho Day, these Cool Ranch Tortillas bring the zesty flavor twist from the land of tacos and tequila.

Hailed as the day of liberty and freedom from Haiti, this Caribbean Independence is embodied in our Jerk Chicken chip. Savour its bold blend of spices that pay homage to the rich cultural heritage on this historic date.

In honor of National Onion Day, savor the distinct taste and aroma of Hawaii's finest Maui onions in these perfectly cooked chips. Paying homage to culinary diversity and flavors from around the world.
Celebrating National Peanut Butter Lover's Day (US), Essential Everyday brings you a smooth and creamy peanut butter that encapsulates the essence of this beloved celebration.
